b_in_scope: src/outer/** — B-track incremental enhancement on outer orchestration layer
scripts/** — B-track scripts and adjustments to existing governance scripts
reports/b_*/** — B-stage evidence and audit trail
config/release_policy.yaml — policy tuning within existing structure
b_out_of_scope: reason_code layering semantic change (INVALID_INPUT / PIPELINE_ERROR / SEM_*)
A-track files: global_state.json, prompts/*, reports/outer_stage*, reports/p2_observation/*
A-track fields in reports/prod_deploy_validation.json (only b_ prefixed appends)
b_allowed_paths: reports/prod_deploy_validation.json (b_-prefixed field appends only, A fields read-only)
b_acceptance_criteria: B2 must produce explicit allowed_files white-list derived from this scope
B3 implementation must not modify any forbidden path
B4 gate checks must pass: smoke 12/12, outer 29/29, full 698/698
B4 must confirm zero schema drift and zero reason_code drift
B5 observation must complete with 3 consecutive days of GO
All B-track report fields must use b_ prefix
b_go_no_go_rule: GO when in_scope/out_of_scope are mutually exclusive, forbidden paths are explicit, immutable contracts are listed and verified against baseline, and B2 entry conditions are defined.
b_b2_entry_conditions: Produce design freeze document defining exact file changes within allowed paths
